label: Successful stow average hail claim severity
interpretation: Below the PV_ARRAY hardware cap; may be comparable to direct module failure-unit loss if BI/deductible/coverage effects are excluded.

label: Fixed-tilt average hail claim severity
interpretation: Above PV_ARRAY hardware cap but within PV_ARRAY + unallocated replacement fieldwork; likely gross-claim/repair-cost grain rather than pure module DR.

label: Tracker failed-stow average hail claim severity
interpretation: Above PV_ARRAY hardware cap but within PV_ARRAY + unallocated replacement fieldwork; likely gross-claim/repair-cost grain rather than pure module DR.

label: Heat-strengthened glass average gross claim amount delta vs fully tempered
interpretation: Delta by module glass type; useful for selector/material knob, not a standalone loss severity.

label: Global closed solar PV hail claims gross amount divided by reported affected capacity
interpretation: Useful normalized reference number, but not directly comparable to M3 module-only damage without source-basis review.

label: SRA 2026 pass/fail threshold for modeled 100-MW SAT configurations
interpretation: Annual/return-period metric; normalize with the value basis, but compare only after M4 event-year loss distribution and insurance/financial basis are aligned.

label: Standard design high-hail-risk 100-MW project net loss AAL
interpretation: Annual/return-period metric; normalize with the value basis, but compare only after M4 event-year loss distribution and insurance/financial basis are aligned.

label: Resilient design high-hail-risk 100-MW project net loss AAL
interpretation: Annual/return-period metric; normalize with the value basis, but compare only after M4 event-year loss distribution and insurance/financial basis are aligned.

label: GCube $58.4M average claim if denominator were 100 MW
interpretation: Sensitivity conversion only because public source lacks the claim capacity denominator; useful for scale checks, not a direct M3 comparison.

label: GCube $58.4M average claim if denominator were 200 MW
interpretation: Sensitivity conversion only because public source lacks the claim capacity denominator; useful for scale checks, not a direct M3 comparison.

interpretation: Sensitivity conversion only because public source lacks the claim capacity denominator; useful for scale checks, not a direct M3 comparison.
